name: Coffee/Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, and salt.
3. Cream shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the egg and instant coffee powder.
5. Gradually blend in the applesauce.
6. Stir in the dry ingredients alternately with water until just combined.
7. Pour batter into an 8-inch square pan.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. For frosting: In a bowl, mix instant coffee granules and hot water. Stir in butter, powdered sugar, and salt until smooth.
10. Cool slightly before spreading frosting over the cake.
